legal_notice: This registry is an engineering control, not legal advice. An approved or conditional decision means the recorded rights and source evidence passed this repository policy; it does not determine whether model training is lawful in every jurisdiction, whether model outputs inherit a source license, or whether an upstream rights holder can authorize every embedded item.

entries.content_scope: Textbook source for Active Prelude, Single and Multivariable editions with matching license notices
excludes: Third-party images, WeBWorK items and instructor-only ancillaries unless separately cleared
entries.attribution: Credit the named authors and Active Calculus edition; include URL, commit/release and CC BY-SA 4.0; publish adaptations under the same license.

entries.content_scope: Repository-authored content
entries.attribution: Retain the Agda standard-library MIT license and contributor copyright notice; record the exact commit.

entries.content_scope: Titles, authors and source links
excludes: Textbook content until item-level review
entries.attribution: Record AIM listing and then the authoritative publisher license evidence.

entries.content_scope: Entries whose license metadata passes the allowlist
excludes: Entries with missing, incompatible or ambiguous license metadata
entries.attribution: Store AFP entry, version, authors, citation, license, dependencies and source hash.

entries.content_scope: Only individual arXiv versions with machine-recorded compatible license identifiers
excludes: Default arXiv non-exclusive distribution license unless separately approved
Withdrawn versions
Third-party appendices or figures
entries.attribution: Store arXiv ID and version, title, authors, submission date, DOI, item license URL and source hash.

entries.content_scope: Identifiers, titles, authors, categories, dates and item-license links
excludes: Source/PDF text without compatible item license
entries.attribution: Retain arXiv ID/version, title, authors, date, category and item-license URL.

entries.content_scope: Released book source and author-owned figures under the CC BY-SA option
excludes: Linked external media
entries.attribution: Credit Jiří Lebl, book title and version; include URL, release hash and CC BY-SA 4.0; mark modifications.

entries.content_scope: Individually inventoried CGAL packages and examples
excludes: Commercial-only components
Packages whose license is not admitted
entries.attribution: Retain package-level GPL/LGPL notices, source obligations, authorship and exact release.

entries.content_scope: Core and standard-library files with compatible headers
excludes: Third-party plugins and external developments
entries.attribution: Preserve LGPL, exception text, copyright notices and component provenance; record release/commit.

entries.content_scope: Bibliographic facts and identifiers explicitly covered by Crossref metadata terms
excludes: Abstracts, full text and publisher-deposited content without independent rights
entries.attribution: Retain DOI, depositor/source, retrieval date and field-level rights information.

entries.content_scope: Repository-authored content
excludes: Optional solver packages and examples with separate licenses
entries.attribution: Retain Apache-2.0, copyright and NOTICE material; record the exact CVXPY commit and solver exclusions.

entries.content_scope: Repository-authored content
entries.attribution: Retain Apache-2.0 and cite the repository commit plus generator configuration.

entries.content_scope: Released book source and author-owned figures under the selected CC BY-SA 4.0 option
excludes: Linked external videos
Third-party WeBWorK items unless their licenses are independently resolved
entries.attribution: Credit Jiří Lebl, book title and version; include URL, release hash and CC BY-SA 4.0; mark modifications.

entries.content_scope: Book source and embedded materials whose notices match CC BY-SA
excludes: Instructor-only resources and external videos
entries.attribution: Credit Oscar Levin, title and edition; include source URL, commit and CC BY-SA 4.0; preserve share-alike.

entries.content_scope: FiPy-authored source and examples
excludes: Third-party dependencies and datasets under separate terms
entries.attribution: Acknowledge NIST and FiPy, retain the full NIST notice, dependency licenses, version and commit.

entries.content_scope: GAP core and individually cleared packages
excludes: Packages with incompatible or missing licenses
entries.attribution: Preserve GPL terms, source availability and package-specific notices; record release/commit.

entries.content_scope: GeoCoq-authored formal source with matching headers
excludes: Generated or imported files with separate terms
entries.attribution: Preserve LGPL terms, authorship and exact commit; retain dependency notices.

entries.content_scope: Resource metadata and links only
excludes: Applets, worksheets, images and text without an explicit compatible license
entries.attribution: Record resource ID, creator, URL, version/date and explicit item license before any content use.

entries.content_scope: Metadata and citation only until license verification
excludes: All book text before verified license capture
entries.attribution: Record title, authors, edition, authoritative URL, hash and verified license before promotion.

entries.content_scope: Repository-authored content
entries.attribution: Retain the MIT notice and cite GSM8K with the exact repository commit and split.

entries.content_scope: Book and solution-book source explicitly covered by the site license
excludes: Linked videos and third-party reviews
entries.attribution: Credit Jim Hefferon, title and edition; include URL, commit and selected CC BY-SA license; preserve share-alike.

entries.content_scope: Repository-authored content
entries.attribution: Retain the MIT notice and cite the benchmark paper, repository commit and split.

entries.content_scope: HOL Light repository files whose headers agree with the project license
excludes: Imported third-party examples without matching headers
entries.attribution: Retain BSD notices and file authorship; record exact commit.

entries.content_scope: Repository-authored content
excludes: examples/muddy
examples/machine-code/graph/seL4-kernel
src/HolSat/sat_solvers/minisat
src/portableML/json
Any self-identified third-party file

entries.content_scope: Book source and project-authored figures covered by the repository license
excludes: Linked translations unless separately licensed
entries.attribution: Credit The Univalent Foundations Program; include title, commit/version and CC BY-SA license; preserve share-alike.

entries.content_scope: Pinned Isabelle release and its documented component inventory
excludes: External sessions not distributed with the release
entries.attribution: Preserve the release COPYRIGHT inventory and all component notices; record release identifier and hash.

entries.content_scope: Repository-authored content
excludes: Bundled dependencies and standard-library components under separate licenses

entries.content_scope: Traces from allowlisted source repositories with transitive license manifests
excludes: Repositories lacking compatible licenses
Canonical benchmark splits reserved for evaluation
entries.attribution: For every trace, retain source repository, file, declaration, commit, license and extraction-tool version.

entries.content_scope: Repository-authored content
entries.attribution: Retain Apache-2.0 and repository notices; record the exact commit.

entries.content_scope: LeanDojo-authored tooling only
excludes: Extracted theorem corpora from third-party repositories
entries.attribution: Retain the LeanDojo MIT notice and pin the exact tooling commit.

entries.content_scope: Page titles, source links and license metadata
excludes: Page text, figures and transclusions until page-level license resolution
entries.attribution: Record page URL, revision/date, original source, authors and page-level license.

entries.content_scope: Official database exports and schema documentation
excludes: Linked papers and third-party images
entries.attribution: Retain database object identifiers, snapshot date, project citation and applicable CC BY-SA notice.

entries.content_scope: Public posts with post ID, author attribution and applicable license version
excludes: Deleted or private posts, profiles, email hashes, avatars and unnecessary user identifiers
Posts whose applicable historical CC BY-SA version cannot be reconstructed
Benchmark or competition items selected for evaluation
entries.attribution: Store post ID, title, URL, author display name, timestamp, revision and applicable CC BY-SA version.

entries.content_scope: Repository-authored content
entries.attribution: Retain the Apache-2.0 license, copyright notices and any NOTICE material; record the exact commit.

entries.content_scope: Repository-authored content
entries.attribution: Record set.mm, project URL, commit and CC0 dedication even though attribution is not legally required.

entries.content_scope: Frozen v1 formal translations and proofs only
excludes: Natural-language competition statements unless separately cleared
Any train split derived from benchmark statements
Main branch after the v1 freeze
entries.attribution: Record miniF2F v1, the exact commit, system-specific folder license, paper citation and original-problem provenance.

entries.content_scope: Mizar items whose repository and article notices match the admitted license
excludes: External articles or tools under different terms
entries.attribution: Preserve GPL terms, article authorship and release/commit provenance.

entries.content_scope: Repository-authored content
entries.attribution: Retain the mpmath BSD license and copyright notice; record the exact commit and test-data provenance.

entries.content_scope: Repository-authored content
excludes: Third-party example data carrying separate terms
entries.attribution: Retain the NetworkX BSD license and copyright notices; record the exact commit and any separately licensed examples.

excludes: Third-party authored material, images or tables without separate clearance

entries.content_scope: Cleared NIST-authored handbook sections and examples

entries.content_scope: Repository-authored content
excludes: Vendored third-party components not covered by NumPy primary license

entries.content_scope: Structured sequence records and references from the official export

entries.content_scope: Project-authored LaTeX source and generated text whose file-level notices agree with CC BY.

entries.content_scope: Catalog metadata and license links
excludes: Book content before item-level review
Reviews beyond quotation limits

entries.content_scope: OpenAlex metadata fields and identifiers
excludes: Linked article full text and third-party landing-page content

entries.content_scope: OpenIntro-owned statistics textbook text, public labs and public datasets with matching notices

Partner-program books
Book covers and trademarks
Third-party images or fair-use media
entries.attribution: Credit book authors and OpenIntro; include edition, URL, commit and CC BY-SA 3.0; remove branding from derivatives and preserve share-alike.

entries.content_scope: Repository-authored content
entries.attribution: Preserve GPL terms, source availability and copyright notices; record release/commit.

entries.content_scope: Metadata and citation only until the item license is allowlisted

entries.content_scope: Repository-authored content
excludes: All external packages downloaded by PETSc configuration

entries.content_scope: Article text and structured links with author/page attribution
excludes: External linked content and media without compatible notices
entries.attribution: Store article title, author/contributor identifiers, URL, revision date and CC BY-SA notice.

entries.content_scope: Project Gutenberg text for individually cleared editions
excludes: Project Gutenberg trademarks/license boilerplate from training text
Items not public domain in target jurisdictions
